query:
SELECT aal.articleId, aal.affiliateLinkId, al.name, LEFT(al.url, 100) as url 
FROM article_affiliate_links aal 
JOIN affiliate_links al ON aal.affiliateLinkId = al.id 
WHERE aal.articleId = (SELECT id FROM articles WHERE slug LIKE '%ai-powered-productivity%' LIMIT 1)
LIMIT 10;
